name: coTfsSDOAbortTest
title: coTfsSDOAbortTest
description: The function aborts the following test after the transmission of messages specified in noOfMsgs. If the test function sends less messages, the test is not aborted.

parameters.name: noOfMsgs
parameters.description: Number of messages after which the test is aborted.

example.code: coTfsSDOAbortTest (3); // stop transmission after third message
